use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and application interfaces
Navigation and routing triggers with link-styled variants
Destructive action confirmations using destructive variant
Accessible interactive elements with proper focus management
ai_summary: A reusable React button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for variant management. Supports standard button sizes and includes accessible focus-visible ring styling with smooth color transitions for hover states.
